zh.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Whittington於1091年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾廷頓。他和Maud de Peverel至少有5個兒子和3個女兒。他去世在他的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: Whittington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of a large number of places called Whittington, for example in Gloucestershire, Worcestershire, Warwickshire, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Lancashire, and Northumberland. Most of these places are named with the Old English personal name Hwīta + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, meaning ‘Hwīta's settlement’ or ‘settlement associated with Hwīta’.

variants.name: Whittenton
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Whittington  .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Whittington was born in 1091, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 5 sons and 3 daughters with Maud de Peverel. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Whittington est né en 1091, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles avec Maud de Peverel. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Whittington wurde 1091 in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mit Maud de Peverel mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Whittington è nato il nel 1091 nel Whittington, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie con Maud de Peverel. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Whittingtonは1091年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンで生まれた。彼はMaud de Peverelとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Whittington(은)는 1091년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 태어났다. 그는 Maud de Peverel(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Whittington nasceu em 1091, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas com Maud de Peverel. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Whittington родился в 1091 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери от Maud de Peverel. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Ranulphus de Whittington nació en 1091, en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas con Maud de Peverel. Murió en su pueblo.
